title: Insert Image into the doc as a block by using api
excerpt:
I can not add an image into the Monday workdoc as a block by using api. 
Can you let me know the any way?

posts.author: antdev357 (Aleksandr)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can not add an image into the Monday workdoc as a block by using api.
Can you let me know the any way?

posts.author: patkoscsaba (Patkós Csaba)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to figure this out as well, but I can’t seem to be able to. I mean I figured out how to add documents, blocks, format the blocks to headers or various text sizes and even lists. But for the sake of it I can’t figure out how to get an image from my computer into a document. I can’t seem to find any examples either … Nor can I find documentation for it on Monday.com. Could you give us some pointers please.
